summary: Cable-news interview clip: Dr. Mehmet Oz appears remotely on MSNBC/MS NOW 'Morning Joe' with the U.S. Capitol behind him, discussing the TrumpRx generic-drug expansion. On-screen chyrons ('TRUMP TOUTS MAJOR TRUMPRX EXPANSION', 'TRUMPRX ADDS MORE THAN 600 GENERIC DRUGS', 'LIVE', 'morning joe') confirm it is a TV news segment. Out of scope: a news/interview clip, not music-driven produced content.
